rationale: In the theory section on post-breach recovery, the citing paper uses Sen and Bhattacharya (2001) as evidence that CSR aligned with customer values can increase consumer identification and loyalty. This claim is part of the logic used to justify hypotheses about why internal CSR should buffer firms after data breaches. Although the citation is grouped with other sources and no method is borrowed, it plays a clear conceptual role beyond a passing mention.
relation_description: The citing paper applies Sen and Bhattacharya's consumer-response insight to a new setting, arguing that customer-oriented CSR can create loyalty and forgiveness that support recovery after a data breach.
